summary: Technology executive and enterprise solutions architect who builds AI-augmented engineering organizations from the ground up. 20+ years progressing from hands-on cloud architecture and digital transformation delivery to leading multi-team engineering organizations—designing operating models, governance frameworks, and platform strategies that convert technical capability into measurable business outcomes. Career arc spans Fortune 500 consulting, regulated fintech platforms, enterprise SaaS modernization, and Healthcare IT at scale. Currently driving AI-first organizational transformation, global team architecture, and M&A integration within a PE-backed growth environment.

experience.title: VP, Software Engineering and Product Development
bullets: ## AI-First Organizational Transformation

Championed enterprise AI adoption against initial executive resistance—delivering a documented 3–4x increase in meaningful code output (500K → 1.5–2M lines) with 30%+ productivity improvement. Conceived and led the organization's first AI Hackathon, designed the AI Development Framework (Developer Directs → AI Executes → Developer Validates), and created the AI-Native PDLC—a 5-stage framework feeding curated context to both engineers and AI agents.

Built an AI Governance Architecture satisfying HIPAA-adjacent compliance: usage policies, security guardrails, cost governance, and audit protocols—converting ad-hoc experiments into governed, repeatable pipelines across the full SDLC.
## Global Capability Center & Team Scaling
Drove a Global Capability Center from concept through signed agreement to structured implementation—wave-based hiring, governance cadence, and org integration model targeting 60–65 person headcount.

Built and led a 57+ person multi-disciplinary engineering organization across multiple time zones (6 direct reports, 4+ teams, 20+ nearshore LATAM contractors) within a PE-backed SaaS scale-up—direct P&L accountability for $4.8M in strategic investments within a $23M R&D budget, delivering 35%+ efficiency improvement.
## M&A Integration & Operational Transformation

Led post-acquisition integration of the OnePacs engineering team—transforming small-shop operations into enterprise-grade delivery with CI/CD maturity, quality gates, FDA audit remediation, and cultural alignment under direct leadership.
## Platform Modernization & Engineering Reliability

Led engineering for a Healthcare SaaS platform serving 5,000+ urgent care providers; coached and guided the creation of the Architecture Hub (repo-based compliance scoring across security, reliability, maintainability, deployability, observability); drove AFC latency fix (6% → 0% failure rate); championed Jenkins → CircleCI migration completed in one day with zero incidents.
## Organizational Leadership & Strategic Operations

Designed quarterly leadership onsites with progressive maturity arc (Identity → Excellence → Focus → Growth → Recalibration → Sharpen the Standard). Served as technical ambassador to PE stakeholders. Championed people-first culture under financial constraint—advocating retention cases against committee pushback while maintaining top 10% performance outcomes.

experience.title: Progressive Leadership Across Regulated & Enterprise Environments
bullets: ## Customer Success & Enterprise Architecture

Chronicled (2022–2023): Led enterprise blockchain implementations for Fortune 100 pharmaceutical customers via GCP-hosted MediLedger; served as Head of Customer Success Services managing implementation consultants with deep Kubernetes configuration expertise.

SafeNet Consulting (2021–2022): Led architecture team delivering multi-tier, cloud-native solutions for Fortune 500 enterprise clients across AWS and Azure—identifying emerging technology opportunities and translating them into actionable adoption strategies.
SysLogic (2019–2021): Championed cloud-first modernization across multiple enterprise engagements—governing solution design, guiding infrastructure adoption, and mentoring engineering talent.
## Regulated Platform & Delivery Leadership

HSA Bank (2014–2019): Dual VP/Director roles over 5 years—architected enterprise integration patterns, governed technology adoption on a regulated financial services platform, reduced support rework by 43% YoY, partnered with CTO on technical strategy.
CoreLogic / MSB (2011–2014): Defined roadmaps and delivered enterprise solutions with full technical specifications, mentoring distributed remote and onsite teams.
Health Payment Systems (2010–2011): Managed software development team ensuring constant improvement, engagement, and productivity across delivery cycles.

items: OCI Certified — Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Generative AI Professional

aiPractitioner.title: AI-Augmented Engineering — Practitioner & Architect Record
aiPractitioner.intro: Built Experity's AI-augmented engineering practice from zero—personally evaluating tooling, defining governance, running the organization's first AI hackathon, and designing the AI-Native PDLC framework before scaling adoption across 57+ engineers. Every policy was grounded in practitioner experience, not delegated from a distance.
bullets: AI Transformation Leadership: Championed AI adoption against initial executive resistance—built the business case, ran Experity's first-ever AI Hackathon, and drove cultural shift from skepticism to embedded practice. Delivered documented 3–4x productivity increase (500K → 1.5–2M lines of meaningful code) with 30%+ cycle time improvement across engineering teams.

AI-Native PDLC Design: Created a 5-stage Product Development Lifecycle (Signal → Context → Decision → Execution → Memory) with an AI Workspace for Product—feeding curated context packets to both human engineers and AI coding agents. Invented the 'Cold-Read Validation' method proving artifact quality before build begins.

Governance Architecture: Designed the organization's AI adoption framework—LLM usage policies, no-auto-merge standards, code review quality gates for AI-generated output, per-team cost tracking, security guardrails, and HIPAA-adjacent audit protocols. Converted ad-hoc tool experiments into governed, repeatable, audited pipelines.

Operating Model Shift: Led transition from manual code producers to agent-augmented reviewers—establishing that the team's constraint shifted from build capacity to review quality (a fundamentally better bottleneck). Defined the Developer Directs → AI Executes → Developer Validates workflow with 80/20 architectural oversight model.

AI-Compressed Incident Response: Deployed AI-assisted runbooks and knowledge retrieval pipelines that compressed initial triage times, automated structured post-incident learning generation, and reduced on-call cognitive load across distributed teams.

Architecture Hub: Coached and guided architecture leadership toward building a repo-based compliance scoring platform—injecting the 'Well-Architected Framework' concept over time, shaping the vision and assessment model across security, reliability, maintainability, deployability, and observability pillars. Enabled automated architecture governance at scale.

Practitioner Certification: OCI Certified — Cloud Infrastructure 2024 Generative AI Professional—hands-on credential covering prompt engineering, RAG architectures, fine-tuning, and responsible GenAI system design. Used to inform architecture decisions and lead AI enablement conversations with credibility.
